# Define params if they do not exist
```{r params, echo = FALSE}
if (!exists("params")) {
  params <- list(
  output_folder = "/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Eren/slip_premie_wip/SLIP_25_11_new_models/analysis_results/",
  centiles_distinct_path = "/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Eren/slip_premie_wip/SLIP_25_11_new_models/data_clean/csv/centiles_distinct_median_th_mpr_2026-04-24.csv",
  centiles_all_path = "/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Eren/slip_premie_wip/SLIP_25_11_new_models/data_clean/csv/centiles_all_median_th_mpr_2026-04-24.csv",
  gamlss_models_path = "/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Eren/slip_premie_wip/SLIP_25_11_new_models/gamlss_models_rds/"
  )
}

``` 

# Load Packages

# Controls

```{r setup, echo = TRUE}
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)
# set command

plot <- TRUE
save_figs <- FALSE

global_measure_sa <- "global_SurfaceArea"
global_measure_th <- "global_MeanThickness"
```

# Define Paths
```{r, echo = TRUE}
# set folder paths
code_path <- "/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Eren/slip_premie_wip/"
vars_path <-  "/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Eren/slip_premie_wip/output/vars_2511_new/"

# output folder
output_folder <- params$output_folder
if (!dir.exists(output_folder)) dir.create(output_folder)
##  output subfolder paths
csv_output_folder <-  paste0(output_folder, "results_csv/")
if (!dir.exists(csv_output_folder)) dir.create(csv_output_folder)

  betas_folder <- paste0(csv_output_folder, "full_betas/")
  if (!dir.exists(betas_folder)) dir.create(betas_folder)
```

# Load custom functions
```{r fcts, echo = FALSE}
source(paste0(code_path,"sliding_window.R"))
source("/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Eren/slip_premie_wip/visualize_model_bartfct.R")
source(glue("{code_path}vis_spline_noint_EK.R"))

panel_save <- function(plot, filename, extension, folder, plot_width = 8, plot_height = 10){
  save_name <- paste0(folder, filename, ".", extension)
  ggsave(save_name, plot = plot, dpi = 300, width = plot_width, height = plot_height)
}
```

# Color Specifications
```{r, echo = TRUE}
limits = c(-0.3, 0.3)
low_color = "#4878CF" # blue
mid_color = "white"
high_color = "#D65F5F" # red

ga_color = "#6D8299" #muted blue
bw_color = "#709085" # muted green
bwp_color = "#A68A64" # muted beige
```

# Read in data files
```{r, echo = FALSE}
full_vars <- read.csv(paste0(vars_path,"all_vars.csv")) %>% pull(x)
global_vars <- read.csv(paste0(vars_path,"global_vars.csv")) %>% pull(x)
vol_vars <- read.csv(paste0(vars_path,"vol_vars.csv")) %>% pull(x)
sa_vars <- read.csv(paste0(vars_path,"sa_vars.csv")) %>% pull(x)
th_vars <- read.csv(paste0(vars_path,"th_vars.csv")) %>% pull(x)
th_vars_median <- c(paste0(th_vars, ".median"))
namemap <- read.csv(glue("{vars_path}name_mapping.csv"))

cent_distinct <- read.csv(centiles_distinct_path) %>% select(-c("X"))
cent_all <- read.csv(centiles_all_path) %>% select(-c("X"))
  
cent_distinct <-  cent_distinct %>% select(-(grep("_Z", names(cent_distinct)))) # I don't remember why this is here.

#determine if there is both mpr and median for thickness values
median_th_mpr_flag <- any(grepl(".median", names(cent_distinct)))

## Define global vars of interest
global_vars_totest <- c("global_eTIV", "global_SubCortGrayVol","global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol","global_SurfaceArea", "global_MeanThickness")
```

# Find if any models don't exist, remove from variable list for downstream analysis.
```{r, echo = FALSE}
vars_missing <- full_vars[!(full_vars %in% names(cent_all))]
print(paste0("Phenotype Variables Missing in the Data Provided: ", paste(vars_missing, collapse = ", ")))
full_vars <- full_vars[!(full_vars %in% vars_missing)]
global_vars <- global_vars[!(global_vars %in% vars_missing)]
vol_vars <- vol_vars[!(vol_vars %in% vars_missing)]
sa_vars <- sa_vars[!(sa_vars %in% vars_missing)]
th_vars <- th_vars[!(th_vars %in% vars_missing)]
```

# Find any cells with missing data within the centile scores
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
check_vars <- c(vol_vars, sa_vars, global_vars, th_vars_median)
check_vars <- check_vars[check_vars != "global_MeanThickness"]
missing_data_sessions <- cent_all[rowSums(is.na(cent_all %>% select(all_of(check_vars)))) > 0, ]$session_id
print(paste0("Number of sessions with any missing centile data: ", length(missing_data_sessions)))
missing_data_sessions_df <- cent_all %>% filter(session_id %in% missing_data_sessions) %>% select(any_of(c("session_id", "participant_id", "adjusted_age_in_years", full_vars)))
} else {
check_vars <- c(full_vars)
missing_data_sessions <- cent_all[rowSums(is.na(cent_all %>% select(all_of(check_vars)))) > 0, ]$session_id
print(paste0("Number of sessions with any missing centile data: ", length(missing_data_sessions)))
missing_data_sessions_df <- cent_all %>% filter(session_id %in% missing_data_sessions) %>% select(any_of(c("session_id", "participant_id", "adjusted_age_in_years", full_vars)))
}
# remove sessions with any missing data (especially for calculating CMDs)
cent_all <- cent_all[!(cent_all$session_id %in% missing_data_sessions),]
```

# Deal with QC Variable Naming Difference
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if(!("median_euler_mean" %in% names(cent_all))){
    cent_all$qc_var <- cent_all$euler_mean
    cent_distinct$qc_var <- cent_distinct$euler_mean
} else if("median_euler_mean" %in% names(cent_all)){
  cent_all$qc_var <- cent_all$median_euler_mean
  cent_distinct$qc_var <- cent_distinct$median_euler_mean
}
```

# Remove BW outliers, and corresponding BWP
```{r}
mu_bw <- mean(cent_distinct$birth_weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_bw <- sd(cent_distinct$birth_weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE)

rm_dist = 5

# cent distinct

nrow(cent_distinct %>% filter(
  birth_weight_kg < mu_bw-sd_bw*rm_dist | birth_weight_kg > mu_bw+sd_bw*rm_dist) )

cent_distinct <- cent_distinct %>%
  mutate(birth_weight_kg_inc_out = birth_weight_kg,
    birth_weight_kg = case_when(
        (birth_weight_kg < mu_bw-sd_bw*rm_dist | birth_weight_kg > mu_bw+sd_bw*rm_dist) ~ NA,
        TRUE ~ birth_weight_kg),
    bwp_fen_inc_out = bwp_fen,
    bwp_fen = case_when(
        is.na(birth_weight_kg) ~ NA,
        TRUE ~ bwp_fen))

sum(!is.na(cent_distinct$birth_weight_kg))
range(cent_distinct$birth_weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE)
sum(!is.na(cent_distinct$birth_weight_kg_outrm))
range(cent_distinct$birth_weight_kg_outrm, na.rm = TRUE)

# cent all
nrow(cent_all %>% filter(
  birth_weight_kg < mu_bw-sd_bw*rm_dist | birth_weight_kg > mu_bw+sd_bw*rm_dist) )

cent_all <- cent_all %>%
  mutate(birth_weight_kg_inc_out = birth_weight_kg,
    birth_weight_kg = case_when(
        (birth_weight_kg < mu_bw-sd_bw*rm_dist | birth_weight_kg > mu_bw+sd_bw*rm_dist) ~ NA,
        TRUE ~ birth_weight_kg),
    bwp_fen_inc_out = bwp_fen,
    bwp_fen = case_when(
        (birth_weight_kg < mu_bw-sd_bw*rm_dist | birth_weight_kg > mu_bw+sd_bw*rm_dist) ~ NA,
        TRUE ~ bwp_fen))
```
# Prepare Df for Analysis

## Set 0/1 centiles to min/max value to avoid Inf/-Inf
numbers from gamlssTools pkg
include weight/height centiles here later (when properly calculated and exported from arcus)
```{r}
complete_centile_vars <- c(full_vars, th_vars_median, "global_MeanThickness.median", "bwp_fen")

for (x in complete_centile_vars){
  cent_distinct[cent_distinct[,x] == 0 & !is.na(cent_distinct[,x]), x] <- 0.0000000000000000000000001
  cent_distinct[cent_distinct[,x] == 1 & !is.na(cent_distinct[,x]), x] <- 0.99999999999999994
  
  cent_all[cent_all[,x] == 0 & !is.na(cent_all[,x]), x] <- 0.0000000000000000000000001
  cent_all[cent_all[,x] == 1 & !is.na(cent_all[,x]), x] <- 0.99999999999999994
}
```

## Set marker for >= 2 years (adjusted age) and >= 1 years (unadjusted age) for thickness sensitivity/analyses
```{r}
cent_distinct$age_over2_adj <- ifelse(cent_distinct$age_years_adj >=2, TRUE, FALSE)
cent_distinct$age_over2_adj <- ifelse(cent_distinct$age_years_adj >=2, TRUE, FALSE)
cent_distinct$age_over1_unadj <- ifelse(cent_distinct$age_at_scan_years >=1, TRUE, FALSE)
cent_distinct$age_over1_unadj <- ifelse(cent_distinct$age_at_scan_years >=1, TRUE, FALSE)

cent_all$age_over2_adj <- ifelse(cent_all$age_years_adj >=2, TRUE, FALSE)
cent_all$age_over2_adj <- ifelse(cent_all$age_years_adj >=2, TRUE, FALSE)
cent_all$age_over1_unadj <- ifelse(cent_all$age_at_scan_years >=1, TRUE, FALSE)
cent_all$age_over1_unadj <- ifelse(cent_all$age_at_scan_years >=1, TRUE, FALSE)
```

## zscore centiles (new df)
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# zscore centiles and other variables of interest
if (median_th_mpr_flag) {
df.zscore <- cent_distinct %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c(full_vars, th_vars_median, "global_MeanThickness.median", 
                         "bwp_fen", "bwp_fen_inc_out")), qnorm)) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c("gestational_age", "birth_weight_kg", 
                         "birth_weight_kg_inc_out",
                         "age_at_scan", "age_at_scan_years", "age_days_adj", "age_years_adj",
                         "qc_var", "euler_mean_mpr", "median_euler_mean")), 
                ~as.numeric(scale(.x))))
} else {
  df.zscore <- cent_distinct %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c(full_vars, "bwp_fen", "bwp_fen_inc_out")), qnorm)) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c("gestational_age", "birth_weight_kg", 
                         "birth_weight_kg_inc_out",
                         "age_at_scan", "age_at_scan_years", "age_days_adj", "age_years_adj",
                         "qc_var")), 
                ~as.numeric(scale(.x))))
}

# set sex and preterm as factor
df.zscore$sex <- as.factor(df.zscore$sex)
df.zscore$preterm <- as.factor(df.zscore$preterm)

# zscore centiles and other variables of interest
if (median_th_mpr_flag) {
df.zscore_all <- cent_all %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c(full_vars, th_vars_median, "bwp_fen", "bwp_fen_inc_out")), qnorm)) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c("gestational_age", "birth_weight_kg", 
                         "birth_weight_kg_inc_out",
                         "age_at_scan", "age_at_scan_years", "age_days_adj", "age_years_adj",
                         "qc_var", "euler_mean_mpr", "median_euler_mean")), 
                ~as.numeric(scale(.x))))
} else {
  df.zscore_all <- cent_all %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c(full_vars, "bwp_fen", "bwp_fen_inc_out")), qnorm)) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c("gestational_age", "birth_weight_kg", 
                         "birth_weight_kg_inc_out",
                         "age_at_scan", "age_at_scan_years", "age_days_adj", "age_years_adj",
                         "qc_var")), 
                ~as.numeric(scale(.x))))
}

# set sex and preterm as factor
df.zscore_all$sex <- as.factor(df.zscore_all$sex)
df.zscore_all$preterm <- as.factor(df.zscore_all$preterm)
```

## find Inf cells, sanity check, should be none
```{r, echo = FALSE}
inf_nan_table <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[c(full_vars, "bwp_fen")], function(x){
  c(inf = sum(is.infinite(x)), nan = sum(is.nan(x)))
})))
max(inf_nan_table$inf)
max(inf_nan_table$nan)

inf_nan_table %>% filter(inf > 0)
```

## Store non-normalized distribution stats to convert back for plots
```{r}
stats_cent_all <- cent_all %>%
  dplyr::summarise(across(all_of(c("gestational_age", "birth_weight_kg",
                                   "birth_weight_kg_inc_out",
                         "age_at_scan", "age_at_scan_years", "age_days_adj", "age_years_adj",
                         "qc_var", "euler_mean_mpr", "median_euler_mean")),
                         list(mean = ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                              sd = ~ sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
                         .names = "{.col}__{.fn}")) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to = c("var", ".value"),
               names_pattern = "^(.*)__(mean|sd)$")

stats_cent_distinct <- cent_distinct %>%
  dplyr::summarise(across(all_of(c("gestational_age", "birth_weight_kg",
                                   "birth_weight_kg_inc_out",
                         "age_at_scan", "age_at_scan_years", "age_days_adj", "age_years_adj",
                         "qc_var", "euler_mean_mpr", "median_euler_mean")),
                         list(mean = ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                              sd = ~ sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
                         .names = "{.col}__{.fn}")) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to = c("var", ".value"),
               names_pattern = "^(.*)__(mean|sd)$")

mean_lookup_all <- setNames(stats_cent_all$mean, stats_cent_all$var)
sd_lookup_all <- setNames(stats_cent_all$sd, stats_cent_all$var)

mean_lookup_distinct <- setNames(stats_cent_distinct$mean, stats_cent_distinct$var)
sd_lookup_distinct <- setNames(stats_cent_distinct$sd, stats_cent_distinct$var)
```

# Code to map raw onto z-score


# CMD on qnorm(centiles)

## calculate CMDs
```{r, echo = FALSE}
vol_vars_cortical <- vol_vars[grep("aparc", vol_vars)]
vol_vars_subcortical <- vol_vars[grep("aseg", vol_vars)]
names.global <- c("global_SubCortGrayVol","global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol")

# CMD Calculation
## global
global.center <- colMeans(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.global)))
global.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.global)))
global.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.global)), global.center, global.cov_matrix))
df.zscore$global.cmd <- global.md

## vol
vol.center <- colMeans(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(vol_vars_cortical)))
vol.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(vol_vars_cortical)))
vol.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(vol_vars_cortical)), vol.center, vol.cov_matrix))
df.zscore$vol.cmd <- vol.md

## sa
sa.center <- colMeans(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(sa_vars)))
sa.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(sa_vars)))
sa.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(sa_vars)), sa.center, sa.cov_matrix))
df.zscore$sa.cmd <- sa.md

## th - calculate above 2 year adjusted, using mpr if the df is median-th-mpr
th.center <- colMeans(df.zscore %>% filter(age_over2_adj == TRUE) %>% select(all_of(th_vars)), na.rm = TRUE)
th.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore %>% filter(age_over2_adj == TRUE) %>% select(all_of(th_vars)), use = "complete.obs")
th.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore %>% filter(age_over2_adj == TRUE) %>% select(all_of(th_vars)), th.center, th.cov_matrix))
df.zscore[df.zscore$age_over2_adj == TRUE,"th.cmd"]  <- th.md

## if the df is median-th-mpr th - calculate all ages, using median
if(median_th_mpr_flag){
  th.center_median_full <- colMeans(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(th_vars_median)), na.rm = TRUE)
  th.cov_matrix_median_full <- cov(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(th_vars_median)), use = "complete.obs")
  th.md_median_full <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(th_vars_median)), th.center_median_full, th.cov_matrix_median_full))
  df.zscore$th.cmd_median_full  <- th.md_median_full
}

## subcort
subcort.center <- colMeans(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(vol_vars_subcortical)))
subcort.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(vol_vars_subcortical)))
subcort.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(vol_vars_subcortical)), subcort.center, subcort.cov_matrix))
df.zscore$subcort.cmd <- subcort.md
```

## Remove outliers based on SD from the mean

### Document N of outliers removed
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sd_remove = 5
print(glue("SD Distance to Remove: {sd_remove}"))

print(glue("Global CMD N removed: {sum((df.zscore$global.cmd < (mean(df.zscore$global.cmd) - sd_remove*sd(df.zscore$global.cmd))) | 
      (df.zscore$global.cmd > (mean(df.zscore$global.cmd) + sd_remove*sd(df.zscore$global.cmd))))}"))

print(glue("Volume CMD N removed: {sum((df.zscore$vol.cmd < (mean(df.zscore$vol.cmd) - sd_remove*sd(df.zscore$vol.cmd))) | 
      (df.zscore$vol.cmd > (mean(df.zscore$vol.cmd) + sd_remove*sd(df.zscore$vol.cmd))))}"))

print(glue("SA CMD N removed: {sum((df.zscore$sa.cmd < (mean(df.zscore$sa.cmd) - sd_remove*sd(df.zscore$sa.cmd))) | 
      (df.zscore$sa.cmd > (mean(df.zscore$sa.cmd) + sd_remove*sd(df.zscore$sa.cmd))))}"))

print(glue("TH CMD, >= 2yrs adj age N removed: {sum((df.zscore$th.cmd < (mean(df.zscore$th.cmd, na.rm = TRUE) - sd_remove*sd(df.zscore$th.cmd, na.rm = TRUE))) | (df.zscore$th.cmd > (mean(df.zscore$th.cmd, na.rm = TRUE) + sd_remove*sd(df.zscore$th.cmd, na.rm = TRUE))), na.rm = TRUE)}"))

print(glue("SubCort CMD N removed: {sum((df.zscore$subcort.cmd < (mean(df.zscore$subcort.cmd) - sd_remove*sd(df.zscore$subcort.cmd))) | 
      (df.zscore$subcort.cmd > (mean(df.zscore$subcort.cmd) + sd_remove*sd(df.zscore$subcort.cmd))))}"))

if(median_th_mpr_flag){
  print(glue("TH CMD, full sample, median N removed: {sum((df.zscore$th.cmd_median_full < (mean(df.zscore$th.cmd_median_full) - sd_remove*sd(df.zscore$th.cmd_median_full))) | 
      (df.zscore$th.cmd_median_full > (mean(df.zscore$th.cmd_median_full) + sd_remove*sd(df.zscore$th.cmd_median_full))))}"))
}
```

### Remove outliers
```{r, echo = FALSE}
#sd_remove = 5
#print(glue("SD Distance to Remove: {sd_remove}"))
#sum(is.na(df.zscore$th.cmd))

df.zscore <- df.zscore %>%
  mutate(global.cmd = case_when(
    (global.cmd < (mean(global.cmd) - sd_remove*sd(global.cmd))) | 
      (global.cmd > (mean(global.cmd) + sd_remove*sd(global.cmd))) ~ NA,
    TRUE ~ global.cmd),
    vol.cmd = case_when(
    (vol.cmd < (mean(vol.cmd) - sd_remove*sd(vol.cmd))) | 
      (vol.cmd > (mean(vol.cmd) + sd_remove*sd(vol.cmd))) ~ NA,
    TRUE ~ vol.cmd),
    sa.cmd = case_when(
    (sa.cmd < (mean(sa.cmd) - sd_remove*sd(sa.cmd))) | 
      (sa.cmd > (mean(sa.cmd) + sd_remove*sd(sa.cmd))) ~ NA,
    TRUE ~ sa.cmd),
    th.cmd = case_when(
    (th.cmd < (mean(th.cmd, na.rm = TRUE) - sd_remove*sd(th.cmd, na.rm = TRUE))) | 
      (th.cmd > (mean(th.cmd, na.rm = TRUE) + sd_remove*sd(th.cmd, na.rm = TRUE))) ~ NA,
    TRUE ~ th.cmd),
     subcort.cmd = case_when(
    (subcort.cmd < (mean(subcort.cmd) - sd_remove*sd(subcort.cmd))) | 
      (subcort.cmd > (mean(subcort.cmd) + sd_remove*sd(subcort.cmd))) ~ NA,
    TRUE ~ subcort.cmd) )

if(median_th_mpr_flag){
  df.zscore <- df.zscore %>%
  mutate(th.cmd_median_full = case_when(
    (th.cmd_median_full < (mean(th.cmd_median_full) - sd_remove*sd(th.cmd_median_full))) | 
      (th.cmd_median_full > (mean(th.cmd_median_full) + sd_remove*sd(th.cmd_median_full))) ~ NA,
    TRUE ~ th.cmd_median_full) )
  sum(is.na(df.zscore$th.cmd_median_full))
  
}

#sum(is.na(df.zscore$global.cmd))
#sum(is.na(df.zscore$vol.cmd))
#sum(is.na(df.zscore$sa.cmd))
#sum(is.na(df.zscore$th.cmd))
#sum(is.na(df.zscore$subcort.cmd))
```

## Correlate CMDs with each other (run above this to set all data up)
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# correlations between CMDs across three centiles
cor_mat <- cor(df.zscore[,c("global.cmd", "vol.cmd", "sa.cmd", "th.cmd", "subcort.cmd")], use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

p_mat <- cor_pmat(df.zscore[,c("global.cmd", "vol.cmd", "sa.cmd", "th.cmd", "subcort.cmd")], use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

(cmd_corrs_plot <- ggcorrplot(
  cor_mat,
  p.mat = p_mat,
  type = "lower",
  insig = "blank",
  lab = TRUE
))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(cmd_corrs_plot, "cmd-cor-matrix", "svg", cmd_plot_folder)
}
```

## CMD Correlations with GA and BW
```{r, echo = FALSE}
vars_bf <- c("gestational_age", "birth_weight_kg", "bwp_fen")
vars_cmd <- c("global.cmd", "vol.cmd", "sa.cmd", "th.cmd", "subcort.cmd")

cmd_bf_plot_df <- df.zscore %>% 
  select(all_of(c(vars_bf, vars_cmd, 
                  "participant_id", "session_id"))) %>%
  pivot_longer(all_of(vars_bf), names_to = "bf_var", values_to = "bf") %>%
  pivot_longer(all_of(vars_cmd), names_to = "cmd_var", values_to = "cmd") %>%
  mutate(bf_var = factor(bf_var, levels = vars_bf),
         cmd_var = factor(cmd_var, levels = vars_cmd))

breaks_ga <- map2_dbl(c(23, 26, 29, 32, 35, 38, 41), "gestational_age", ~ (.x*7 - mean_lookup_distinct[[.y]])/sd_lookup_distinct[[.y]])

breaks_bw <- pretty(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg, n = 5)

breaks_bwp <- qnorm(c(.05,.50,.95))

bf_scales <- list(
  "gestational_age" = scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = breaks_ga, 
    labels = paste0(round(map2_dbl(breaks_ga, "gestational_age", ~ .x*sd_lookup_distinct[[.y]] + mean_lookup_distinct[[.y]])/7))),
  "birth_weight_kg" = scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = breaks_bw, 
    labels = paste0(round(map2_dbl(breaks_bw, "birth_weight_kg", ~ .x*sd_lookup_distinct[[.y]] + mean_lookup_distinct[[.y]]))) ),
  "bwp_fen" = scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = breaks_bwp, 
    labels = paste0(round(pnorm(breaks_bwp)*100))) )

# cmd_scales <- list(
#   "global.cmd" = scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 50, 100), position = "right")
# )

cmd_labels <- c("global.cmd" = "Global", 
                "vol.cmd" = "Volume",
                "sa.cmd" = "Surface Area",
                "th.cmd" = "Thickness",
                "subcort.cmd" = "Subcortical")
bf_labels  <- c("gestational_age" = "Gestational Age (wks)", 
                "birth_weight_kg" = "Birth Weight (kg)",
                "bwp_fen" = "Birth Weight Percentile")


(cmd_bf_plot <- ggplot(cmd_bf_plot_df, aes(x = bf, y = cmd, color = bf_var)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.15, size = 0.75) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 0.7) +
  ggpubr::stat_cor(
    method = "pearson",
    aes(label = paste(..r.label.., ..p.label.., sep = "~`,`~")),
    label.x.npc = .4,
    label.y.npc = .95,
    size = 5,
    color = "gray30") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("gestational_age" = ga_color,
                              "birth_weight_kg" = bw_color,
                              "bwp_fen" = bwp_color)) +
  facet_grid(cmd_var ~ bf_var, scales = "free",
             labeller = labeller(cmd_var = cmd_labels, bf_var = bf_labels),
             switch = "both") +
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales(x = bf_scales) +
  labs(x = NULL,
    y = "Centile Mahalanobis Distance") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 24),
        strip.text.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 30),
        axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 30),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.position = "none",
        panel.spacing.x = unit(0.5, "cm"),
        panel.spacing.y = unit(0.25, "cm")) )

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(cmd_bf_plot, "cmd-bf-facet-plot", "svg", cmd_plot_folder, plot_width = 14, plot_height = 10)
}
```

# Global phenotypes (euler mean QC score as covariate)

## simple linear regression
### GA
```{r, echo = FALSE}
ga_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(global_vars_totest, function(x) {
  dat <- df.zscore
  if (grepl("Thick", x)) {
    dat <- df.zscore %>% filter(age_over2_adj == TRUE)
    if(median_th_mpr_flag){
      form <- reformulate(termlabels = c("gestational_age", "euler_mean_mpr"), response = x)
    }
    } else {
     form <- reformulate(termlabels = c("gestational_age", "qc_var"), response = x)
    }
   fit <- lm(form, data = dat)
   summary_fit <- summary(fit)
  c(ga_beta = summary_fit$coefficients["gestational_age", "Estimate"],
    ga_p    = summary_fit$coefficients["gestational_age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
    ga_se   = summary_fit$coefficients["gestational_age", "Std. Error"] )
})))

ga_reg_table_global$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga_reg_table_global$ga_p, method = "BH")

ga_reg_table_global %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)
range(ga_reg_table_global %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(ga_beta))
```

### BW
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(global_vars_totest, function(x) {
  dat <- df.zscore
  if (grepl("Thick", x)) {
    dat <- df.zscore %>% filter(age_over2_adj == TRUE)
    if(median_th_mpr_flag){
      form <- reformulate(termlabels = c("birth_weight_kg", "euler_mean_mpr"), response = x)
    }
    } else {
     form <- reformulate(termlabels = c("birth_weight_kg", "qc_var"), response = x)
    }
   fit <- lm(form, data = dat)
   summary_fit <- summary(fit)
  c(bw_beta = summary_fit$coefficients["birth_weight_kg", "Estimate"],
    bw_p    = summary_fit$coefficients["birth_weight_kg", "Pr(>|t|)"],
    bw_se   = summary_fit$coefficients["birth_weight_kg", "Std. Error"] )
})))

bw_reg_table_global$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw_reg_table_global$bw_p, method = "BH")

bw_reg_table_global %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)
range(bw_reg_table_global %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(bw_beta))
```

### BWp
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bwp_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(global_vars_totest, function(x) {
  dat <- df.zscore
  if (grepl("Thick", x)) {
    dat <- df.zscore %>% filter(age_over2_adj == TRUE)
    if(median_th_mpr_flag){
      form <- reformulate(termlabels = c("bwp_fen", "euler_mean_mpr"), response = x)
    }

     form <- reformulate(termlabels = c("bwp_fen", "qc_var"), response = x)
    }
   fit <- lm(form, data = dat)
   summary_fit <- summary(fit)
  c(bwp_beta = summary_fit$coefficients["bwp_fen", "Estimate"],
    bwp_p    = summary_fit$coefficients["bwp_fen", "Pr(>|t|)"],
    bwp_se   = summary_fit$coefficients["bwp_fen", "Std. Error"] )
})))
```

### Visualize/Figure Panel
```{r, echo = FALSE}
#  Add phenotype column from rownames
ga_reg_table_global$phenotype <- rownames(ga_reg_table_global)
bw_reg_table_global$phenotype <- rownames(bw_reg_table_global)
bwp_reg_table_global$phenotype <- rownames(bwp_reg_table_global)

#  Add model identifiers + rename to common column names
ga_reg_table_global <- ga_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(model = "Gestational Age",
         beta = ga_beta,
         se   = ga_se,
         p_adj    = ga_p_adj) %>%
    mutate(sig = p_adj < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig ~ ga_color,
            TRUE ~ "gray70"))

bw_reg_table_global <- bw_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(model = "Birth Weight",
         beta = bw_beta,
         se   = bw_se,
         p_adj    = bw_p_adj) %>%
    mutate(sig = p_adj < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig ~ bw_color,
            TRUE ~ "gray70"))

bwp_reg_table_global <- bwp_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(model = "Birth Weight Percentile",
         beta = bwp_beta,
         se   = bwp_se,
         p_adj    = bwp_p_adj) %>%
    mutate(sig = p_adj < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig  ~ bwp_color,
            TRUE ~ "gray70"))

#  Combine and arrange by specific order of global phenotypes
df <- bind_rows(ga_reg_table_global, bw_reg_table_global, bwp_reg_table_global) %>%
  mutate(phenotype = factor(phenotype, levels = c("global_eTIV", "global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol",
                                                  "global_SubCortGrayVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol",
                                                  "global_SurfaceArea", "global_MeanThickness"))) %>% arrange(phenotype)

#  Labeling for phenotypes on plot
phenotype_labs <- c(
 global_eTIV = "Intracranial Volume",
 global_MeanThickness = "Mean Cortical Thickness",
 global_VentricleChoroidVol = "Ventricular Volume",
 global_SurfaceArea = "Total Surface Area",
 global_CortexVol = "Cortical Gray Matter Volume",
 global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol = "Cerebral White Matter Volume",
 global_SubCortGrayVol = "Subcortical Gray Matter Volume"
)

#  Plot
(global_betas_plot <- ggplot(df, aes(x = beta, y = phenotype)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = model, color = color), size = 6) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = beta - se, xmax = beta + se, color = color), height = 0.1) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Gestational Age" = 16, "Birth Weight" = 17, "Birth Weight Percentile" = 15),
                       name = "") +
    scale_color_identity() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 0.3)) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits = rev, labels = phenotype_labs) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 30) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate, QC covar") +
    ylab(""))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(global_betas_plot, "global-betas-gabw", "svg", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 15, plot_height = 15)
}
```


## linear interaction with age
### GA
```{r, echo = FALSE}
gabyage_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(global_vars_totest, function(x) {
  dat <- df.zscore
  if (grepl("Thick", x)) {
    dat <- df.zscore %>% filter(age_over2_adj == TRUE)
    if(median_th_mpr_flag){
      form <- reformulate(termlabels = c("gestational_age", "age_days_adj", "euler_mean_mpr","gestational_age:age_days_adj"), response = x)
    }
    } else {
     form <- reformulate(termlabels = c("gestational_age", "age_days_adj", "qc_var", "gestational_age:age_days_adj"), response = x)
    }
   fit <- lm(form, data = dat)
   summary_fit <- summary(fit)
  c(ga_beta = summary_fit$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary_fit$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary_fit$coefficients[2,2],
    age_beta = summary_fit$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary_fit$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary_fit$coefficients[3,2],
    gabyage_beta = summary_fit$coefficients[5,1], gabyage_p = summary_fit$coefficients[5,4], gabyage_se = summary_fit$coefficients[5,2])
})))

gabyage_reg_table_global$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_reg_table_global$ga_p, method = "BH")
gabyage_reg_table_global$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_reg_table_global$age_p, method = "BH")
gabyage_reg_table_global$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_reg_table_global$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA Main - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage_reg_table_global %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Age Main significant results after FDR (shouldn't be any): ", dim(gabyage_reg_table_global %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA x Age- NO correction: ", dim(gabyage_reg_table_global %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA x Age- AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage_reg_table_global %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

### BW

## nonlinear interaction with age ***
### GA

#### fit models
```{r, echo = FALSE}
gabyage_sp_models_global <- lapply(global_vars_totest, function(x) {
  dat <- df.zscore
  if(grepl("Thick", x)) {
    dat <- df.zscore %>% filter(age_over2_adj == TRUE)
      if(median_th_mpr_flag == TRUE){
          form <- as.formula(glue("{x} ~ s(gestational_age) + s(age_days_adj) + ti(gestational_age, age_days_adj) + euler_mean_mpr"))
        }
      } else {
    form <- as.formula(glue("{x} ~ s(gestational_age) + s(age_days_adj) + ti(gestational_age, age_days_adj) + qc_var"))
      }
  gam_model <- gamm(as.formula(form),
              data = dat)
  return(gam_model) })

gabyage_sp_models_global <- setNames(gabyage_sp_models_global, global_vars_totest)

gabyage_sp_gam_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(gabyage_sp_models_global,function(x) {
  summary <- summary(x$gam)
  c(ga_edf = summary$s.table[1,1], ga_p = summary$s.table[1,4],
    age_edf = summary$s.table[2,1], age_p = summary$s.table[2,4],
    gabyage_edf = summary$s.table[3,1], gabyage_p = summary$s.table[3,4])
  })))

rownames(gabyage_sp_gam_table_global) <- global_vars_totest

gabyage_sp_gam_table_global$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_sp_gam_table_global$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA x Age- NO correction: ", dim(gabyage_sp_gam_table_global %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA x Age- AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage_sp_gam_table_global %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

#### Visualize models (for curiosity's sake)
```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
font_size <- 16
theme_set(theme_classic(base_family = "sans",base_size = font_size))
line_size <- 1.5
point_size <- 2
source("/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Eren/slip_premie_wip/visualize_model_bartfct.R")

mu_age <- mean(cent_distinct$age_days_adj, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_age <- sd(cent_distinct$age_days_adj, na.rm = TRUE)

mu_ga <- mean(cent_distinct$gestational_age, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_ga <- sd(cent_distinct$gestational_age, na.rm = TRUE)

gabyage_sp_plots_global <- lapply(gabyage_sp_models_global, function(x) {
  
  low_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age),
                                       "age_days_adj"],
                             probs = c(.10)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  
  mid_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age),
                                       "age_days_adj"],
                             probs = c(.50)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25

  high_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age),
                                      "age_days_adj"],
                            probs = c(.90)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  
  model_plot <- visualize_model(
  modobj = x,
  smooth_var = "gestational_age",
  int_var = "age_days_adj",
  plabels = "continuous interaction",
  derivative_plot = F)

  if(grepl("Thick",x$gam$pterms[[2]])) {
    
    low_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[df.zscore$age_over2_adj == TRUE & !is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age),
                                                 "age_days_adj"],
                               probs = c(.05)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
    
    mid_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[df.zscore$age_over2_adj == TRUE & !is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age),
                                                 "age_days_adj"],
                             probs = c(.50)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
      

    high_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[df.zscore$age_over2_adj == TRUE & !is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age),
                                                 "age_days_adj"],
                            probs = c(.95)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  }
  plot_colors <- ggplot_build(model_plot)$plot$scales$get_scales("fill")$palette(1)
  
  model_plot <- model_plot + 
    labs(x="Gestational Age (complete wks)",
         title = glue("{x$gam$terms[[2]]}"),
                  fill = "Age") +
    theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) floor((x * sd_ga + mu_ga)/7)) +
  scale_fill_manual(labels = c(paste0("Low: ",
                                      round(low_age_label,1),"yrs"),
                               paste0("Mid: ",
                                      round(mid_age_label,1),"yrs"),
                               paste0("High: ",
                                      round(high_age_label,1),"yrs")), 
                    values = plot_colors) +
   scale_color_gradientn(colors = plot_colors,
    labels = function(x) round((x * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25, 1),
    name = "") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(y) signif(pnorm(y)*100, 3))
})

gabyage_sp_plots_global <- setNames(gabyage_sp_plots_global, global_vars_totest)

if(save_figs){
saveRDS(gabyage_sp_plots_global, glue("{modelvis_plot_folder}gabyage_sp_plots_global.rds"))
}
```

```{r, echo = TRUE}

wrap_plots(gabyage_sp_plots_global[5:7], ncol = 2)
```

### BW outliers removed

#### fit models
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bwbyage_sp_models_global <- lapply(global_vars_totest, function(x) {
  dat <- df.zscore
  if(grepl("Thick", x)) {
    dat <- df.zscore %>% filter(age_over2_adj == TRUE)
      if(median_th_mpr_flag == TRUE){
          form <- as.formula(glue("{x} ~ s(birth_weight_kg_outrm) + s(age_days_adj) + ti(birth_weight_kg_outrm, age_days_adj) + euler_mean_mpr"))
        }
      } else {
    form <- as.formula(glue("{x} ~ s(birth_weight_kg_outrm) + s(age_days_adj) + ti(birth_weight_kg_outrm, age_days_adj) + qc_var"))
      }
  gam_model <- gamm(as.formula(form),
              data = dat)
  return(gam_model) })

bwbyage_sp_models_global <- setNames(bwbyage_sp_models_global, global_vars_totest)

bwbyage_sp_gam_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(bwbyage_sp_models_global,function(x) {
  summary <- summary(x$gam)
  c(bw_edf = summary$s.table[1,1], bw_p = summary$s.table[1,4],
    age_edf = summary$s.table[2,1], age_p = summary$s.table[2,4],
    bwbyage_edf = summary$s.table[3,1], bwbyage_p = summary$s.table[3,4])
  })))

rownames(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_global) <- global_vars_totest

bwbyage_sp_gam_table_global$bwbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_global$bwbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for BW x Age- NO correction: ", dim(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_global %>% filter(bwbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for BW x Age- AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_global %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
font_size <- 16
theme_set(theme_classic(base_family = "sans",base_size = font_size))
line_size <- 1.5
point_size <- 2
source("/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Eren/slip_premie_wip/visualize_model_bartfct.R")

mu_age <- mean(cent_all$age_days_adj, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_age <- sd(cent_all$age_days_adj, na.rm = TRUE)

mu_bw <- mean(cent_all$birth_weight_kg_outrm, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_bw <- sd(cent_all$birth_weight_kg_outrm, na.rm = TRUE)

bwbyage.outrm_sp_plots_global <- lapply(bwbyage_sp_models_global, function(x) {
  
  low_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg_outrm),
                                       "age_days_adj"],
                             probs = c(.10)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  
  mid_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg_outrm),
                                       "age_days_adj"],
                             probs = c(.50)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25

  high_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg_outrm),
                                      "age_days_adj"],
                            probs = c(.90)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  
  model_plot <- visualize_model(
  modobj = x,
  smooth_var = "birth_weight_kg_outrm",
  int_var = "age_days_adj",
  plabels = "continuous interaction",
  derivative_plot = F)

  if(grepl("Thick",x$gam$pterms[[2]])) {
    
    low_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[df.zscore$age_over2_adj == TRUE & !is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg_outrm),
                                                 "age_days_adj"],
                               probs = c(.05)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
    
    mid_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[df.zscore$age_over2_adj == TRUE & !is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg_outrm),
                                                 "age_days_adj"],
                             probs = c(.50)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
      

    high_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[df.zscore$age_over2_adj == TRUE & !is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg_outrm),
                                                 "age_days_adj"],
                            probs = c(.95)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  }
  plot_colors <- ggplot_build(model_plot)$plot$scales$get_scales("fill")$palette(1)
  
  model_plot <- model_plot + 
    labs(x="Birth Weight (kg)",
         title = glue("{x$gam$terms[[2]]}"),
                  fill = "Age") +
    theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) round(x * sd_bw + mu_bw, 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(labels = c(paste0("Low: ",
                                      round(low_age_label,1),"yrs"),
                               paste0("Mid: ",
                                      round(mid_age_label,1),"yrs"),
                               paste0("High: ",
                                      round(high_age_label,1),"yrs")), 
                    values = plot_colors) +
   scale_color_gradientn(colors = plot_colors,
    labels = function(x) round((x * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25, 1),
    name = "") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(y) signif(pnorm(y)*100, 3))
})

bwbyage_sp_plots_global <- setNames(bwbyage_sp_plots_global, global_vars_totest)

if(save_figs){

}
```

# Global phenotypes (euler mean QC score and weight/height at encounter as covariate) ***
## GA
```{r, echo = FALSE}
ga.wh_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(global_vars_totest, function(x) {
  col = df.zscore[,x]
  lm <- lm(col ~ df.zscore$gestational_age + df.zscore$qc_var + df.zscore$weight_at_enc_cent + df.zscore$height_at_enc_cent )
  if(grepl("Thick", x)) {
    col = df.zscore_overOne[,x]
    lm <- lm(col ~ df.zscore_overOne$gestational_age + df.zscore_overOne$qc_var + df.zscore_overOne$weight_at_enc_cent + df.zscore_overOne$height_at_enc_cent)
  }
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

if(median_th_mpr_flag == TRUE){
  x = df.zscore_overOne$global_MeanThickness
    lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore_overOne$gestational_age + df.zscore_overOne$euler_mean_mpr + df.zscore_overOne$weight_at_enc_cent + df.zscore_overOne$height_at_enc_cent)
    summary <- summary(lm)
    ga.wh_reg_table_global[rownames(ga_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "ga_beta"] <- summary$coefficients[2,1]
    ga.wh_reg_table_global[rownames(ga_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "ga_p"] <- summary$coefficients[2,4]
    ga.wh_reg_table_global[rownames(ga_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "ga_se"] <- summary$coefficients[2,2]
  }

ga.wh_reg_table_global$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.wh_reg_table_global$ga_p, method = "BH")

ga.wh_reg_table_global %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)
range(ga.wh_reg_table_global %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(ga_beta))
```

## BW
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw.wh_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(global_vars_totest, function(x) {
  col = df.zscore[,x]
  lm <- lm(col ~ df.zscore$birth_weight_kg + df.zscore$qc_var + df.zscore$weight_at_enc_cent + df.zscore$height_at_enc_cent )
  if(grepl("Thick", x)) {
    col = df.zscore_overOne[,x]
    lm <- lm(col ~ df.zscore_overOne$birth_weight_kg + df.zscore_overOne$qc_var + df.zscore_overOne$weight_at_enc_cent + df.zscore_overOne$height_at_enc_cent)
  }
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

if(median_th_mpr_flag == TRUE){
  x = df.zscore_overOne$global_MeanThickness
    lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore_overOne$birth_weight_kg + df.zscore_overOne$euler_mean_mpr + df.zscore_overOne$weight_at_enc_cent + df.zscore_overOne$height_at_enc_cent)
    summary <- summary(lm)
    bw.wh_reg_table_global[rownames(ga_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "bw_beta"] <- summary$coefficients[2,1]
    bw.wh_reg_table_global[rownames(ga_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "bw_p"] <- summary$coefficients[2,4]
    bw.wh_reg_table_global[rownames(ga_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "bw_se"] <- summary$coefficients[2,2]
  }


bw.wh_reg_table_global$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.wh_reg_table_global$bw_p, method = "BH")

bw.wh_reg_table_global %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)
range(bw.wh_reg_table_global %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(bw_beta))
```

## Visualize/Figure Panel
```{r, echo = FALSE}
#  Add phenotype column from rownames
ga.wh_reg_table_global$phenotype <- rownames(ga.wh_reg_table_global)
bw.wh_reg_table_global$phenotype <- rownames(bw.wh_reg_table_global)

#  Add model identifiers + rename to common column names
ga.wh_reg_table_global <- ga.wh_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(model = "Gestational Age",
         beta = ga_beta,
         se   = ga_se,
         p_adj    = ga_p_adj) %>%
    mutate(sig = p_adj < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig & beta > 0 ~ "#c87a7a",   #  muted red
            sig & beta < 0 ~ "#7293b0",   #  muted blue
            TRUE ~ "gray70"))

bw.wh_reg_table_global <- bw.wh_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(model = "Birthweight",
         beta = bw_beta,
         se   = bw_se,
         p_adj    = bw_p_adj) %>%
    mutate(sig = p_adj < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig & beta > 0 ~ "#c87a7a",   #  muted red
            sig & beta < 0 ~ "#7293b0",   #  muted blue
            TRUE ~ "gray70"))

#  Combine and arrange by specific order of global phenotypes
df.wh <- bind_rows(ga.wh_reg_table_global, bw.wh_reg_table_global) %>%
  mutate(phenotype = factor(phenotype, levels = c("global_eTIV", "global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol",
                                                  "global_SubCortGrayVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol",
                                                  "global_SurfaceArea", "global_MeanThickness"))) %>% arrange(phenotype)

#  Labeling for phenotypes on plot
phenotype_labs <- c(
 global_eTIV = "Intracranial Volume",
 global_MeanThickness = "Mean Cortical Thickness",
 global_VentricleChoroidVol = "Ventricular Volume",
 global_SurfaceArea = "Total Surface Area",
 global_CortexVol = "Cortical Gray Matter Volume",
 global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol = "Cerebral White Matter Volume",
 global_SubCortGrayVol = "Subcortical Gray Matter Volume"
)

#  Plot
(global.wh_betas_plot <- ggplot(df.wh, aes(x = beta, y = phenotype)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = model, color = color), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = beta - se, xmax = beta + se, color = color), height = 0.2) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Gestational Age" = 16, "Birthweight" = 17),
                       name = "") +
    scale_color_identity() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.16, 0.3)) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits = rev, labels = phenotype_labs) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate, QC and W/H covar") +
    ylab(""))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(global.wh_betas_plot, "global-wh-betas-gabw", "svg", plot_output_folder)
}
```

# Global phenotypes, test lme() model with random effect for subject id using repeated measures dataframe ***
# Regional phenotypes (no covariates, full available sample)

## GA

### Volume

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age) & is.na(df.zscore$aparc_GrayVol_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga_vol$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga_vol$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga_vol %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(ga_vol), perl = TRUE)

ga_vol$label <- rownames(ga_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>% 
  sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% 
  sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

ga_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", ga_vol$label[cols_edit])

ga_vol_sig_MC <- ga_vol %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(ga_vol_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- ga_vol
name <- "ga_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <- dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(ga_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(ga_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(ga_vol_noplot <- ga_vol_sig_MC[!(ga_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(ga_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(ga_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GA Volume"))

(ga_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "GA Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(ga_dkt_vol_plot, "ga-dkt-vol", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
panel_save(ga_aseg_vol_plot , "ga-aseg-vol", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
}
```

##### Scatterplot for top betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(ga_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
top_n = if(dim(ga_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 10) {10} else {dim(ga_vol_sig_MC)[1]}
top <- ga_vol_sig_MC[order(ga_vol_sig_MC$ga_beta, decreasing = TRUE)[1:top_n],]
scatterplots_ga_vol <- vector(mode = "list", length = top_n)
for(i in 1:top_n){
  pheno <- rownames(top)[i]
  title <- top$label[i]
  names(scatterplots_ga_vol[i]) <- pheno
  scatterplots_ga_vol[[i]] <- ggplot(df.zscore, aes(x = gestational_age, y = !!sym(pheno))) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(x = "Gestational Age (z-scored)", y = "Centile (z-scored)", title = title)
}

nCol <- 2
nRow <- 2
breaks <- c(seq(from = 0, to = top_n , by = (nCol*nRow)), top_n) %>% unique(.)
for(k in 1:(length(breaks)-1)){
  start <- breaks[k]+1
  end <- breaks[k+1]
  do.call("grid.arrange", c(scatterplots_ga_vol[start:end], ncol=nCol))
}
}
```


####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
gabyage_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*age_days_adj, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   gabyage_beta = summary$coefficients[4,1], gabyage_p = summary$coefficients[4,4], gabyage_se = summary$coefficients[4,2])
})))

gabyage_vol$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_vol$ga_p, method = "BH")
gabyage_vol$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_vol$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(gabyage_vol %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(gabyage_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(gabyage_vol), perl = TRUE)

gabyage_vol$label <- rownames(gabyage_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

gabyage_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", gabyage_vol$label[cols_edit])

gabyage_vol_sig_MC <- gabyage_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(gabyage_vol_sig_MC$gabyage_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- gabyage_vol
name <- "gabyage_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualize interaction betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(gabyage_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(gabyage_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(gabyage_vol_noplot <- gabyage_vol_sig_MC[!(gabyage_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(gabyage_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(gabyage_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = gabyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GAxAge Interaction Volume"))

(gabyage_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = gabyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "GAxAge Interaction Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(gabyage_dkt_vol_plot, "gabyage-dkt-vol", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
panel_save(gabyage_aseg_vol_plot , "gabyage-aseg-vol", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
}
```

##### visualize interaction plots
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(gabyage_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
vars <- rownames(gabyage_vol_sig_MC[order(-(gabyage_vol_sig_MC$gabyage_beta)),])
interaction_plots <-  vector(mode = "list", length = length(vars))
if (length(vars) > 0) {
for (i in 1:length(vars)){
  x <- df.zscore[,grepl(pattern = paste0(vars[i],"$"), names(df.zscore))]
  y_label <- sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", vars[i])
  y_label <- sub("aseg_", "", vars[i])
  y_label <- sub("X", "", vars[i])
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*age_days_adj, df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  interaction_plots[[i]] <- interact_plot(lm, pred = gestational_age, modx = age_days_adj) + ylab(y_label) + ggtitle(paste0("gabyage beta = ", as.character(signif(summary$coefficients[4,1], 3))))
}
interaction_plots
}
}
```

### Surface Area

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age) & is.na(df.zscore$aparc_SurfArea_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga_sa$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga_sa$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga_sa %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

### Thickness

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age) & !is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga_th$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga_th$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga_th %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### median vs mpr compare
###### compute regressions with median thickness
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga_th_median <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars_median)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga_th_median$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga_th_median$ga_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(ga_th_median %>% filter(ga_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(ga_th_median %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

###### comparison plot
```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="200%"}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts.median))
ga_th_median_sig_MC <- ga_th_median %>% 
    mutate(type = "median",
         pheno = sub(".median", "", rownames(ga_th_median))) %>%
  filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

ga_th_subset <- ga_th[rownames(ga_th) %in% sub(".median", "", rownames(ga_th_median_sig_MC)),]
ga_th_subset <- ga_th_subset %>% mutate(type = "mpr",
         pheno = rownames(.))

ga_th_sig_all <- rbind(ga_th_median_sig_MC, ga_th_subset)

(ga_beta_compare_plot <- ggplot(ga_th_sig_all, aes(x = ga_beta, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = ga_beta - ga_se, xmax = ga_beta + ga_se, color = type), height = 0.2) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 0.03)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate GA Univ") +
    ylab(""))

(ga_p_compare_plot <- ggplot(ga_th_sig_all, aes(x = ga_p_adj, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Adjusted (BH) P-value for GA Univ") +
    ylab(""))

ga_compare_plot <- ga_beta_compare_plot + ga_p_compare_plot + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(ga_compare_plot, "ga-th-compare-plot", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder, plot_width = 18, plot_height = 10)
}

}

ga_compare_plot
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}

  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

ga_th_sig_MC <- ga_th %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(ga_th_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(ga_th_sig_MC)[1] > 0){

top <- ga_th_sig_MC[order(abs(ga_th_sig_MC$ga_beta), decreasing = TRUE)[1:top_n],]
scatterplots_ga_th <- vector(mode = "list", length = top_n)
for(i in 1:top_n){
  print(i)

  print(pheno)
  title <- top$label[i]
  names(scatterplots_ga_th)[i] <- pheno
  scatterplots_ga_th[[i]] <- ggplot(df.zscore, aes(x = gestational_age, y = !!sym(pheno))) +
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
gabyage_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*age_days_adj, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   gabyage_beta = summary$coefficients[4,1], gabyage_p = summary$coefficients[4,4], gabyage_se = summary$coefficients[4,2])
})))

gabyage_th$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_th$ga_p, method = "BH")
gabyage_th$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_th$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(gabyage_th %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(gabyage_th %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage_th %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### median vs mpr compare
###### compute regressions with median thickness
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
gabyage_th_median <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars_median)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*age_days_adj, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   gabyage_beta = summary$coefficients[4,1], gabyage_p = summary$coefficients[4,4], gabyage_se = summary$coefficients[4,2])
})))

gabyage_th_median$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_th_median$ga_p, method = "BH")
gabyage_th_median$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_th_median$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(gabyage_th_median %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(gabyage_th_median %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage_th_median %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

###### comparison plot
```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="200%"}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
print(glue("N for MPR thickness: {sum(!is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))}"))
print(glue("N for Median thickness: {sum(!is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts.median))}"))
gabyage_th_median_sig_MC <- gabyage_th_median %>% 
    mutate(type = "median",
         pheno = sub(".median", "", rownames(gabyage_th_median))) %>%
  filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05)


gabyage_th_subset<- gabyage_th[rownames(gabyage_th) %in% sub(".median", "", rownames(gabyage_th_median_sig_MC)),] %>%
  mutate(type = "mpr",
         pheno = rownames(.))

gabyage_th_sig_all <- rbind(gabyage_th_median_sig_MC, gabyage_th_subset)

(gabyage_beta_compare_plot <- ggplot(gabyage_th_sig_all, aes(x = gabyage_beta, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = gabyage_beta - gabyage_se, xmax = gabyage_beta + gabyage_se, color = type), height = 0.2) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 0.03)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate GA x Age") +
    ylab(""))

(gabyage_p_compare_plot <- ggplot(gabyage_th_sig_all, aes(x = gabyage_p_adj, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Adjusted (BH) P-value for GA x Age") +
    ylab(""))

gabyage_compare_plot <- gabyage_beta_compare_plot + gabyage_p_compare_plot + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(gabyage_compare_plot, "gabyage-th-compare-plot", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder, plot_width = 18, plot_height = 10)
}
}

gabyage_compare_plot 
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
gabyage_th$label <- rownames(gabyage_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)
  
gabyage_th_sig_MC <- gabyage_th %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(gabyage_th_sig_MC$gabyage_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- gabyage_th
name <- "gabyage_thick.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualize interaction betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(gabyage_th_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(gabyage_th_noplot <- gabyage_th_sig_MC[!(gabyage_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(gabyage_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(gabyage_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = gabyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GAxAge Cortical Thickness"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(gabyage_dkt_th_plot, "gabyage-dkt-th", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
}
```

##### visualize interaction plots
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(gabyage_th_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
vars <- rownames(gabyage_th_sig_MC[order(-(gabyage_th_sig_MC$gabyage_beta)),])
interaction_plots <-  vector(mode = "list", length = length(vars))
if (length(vars) > 0) {
for (i in 1:length(vars)){
  x <- df.zscore[,grepl(pattern = paste0(vars[i],"$"), names(df.zscore))]
  y_label <- sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", vars[i])
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*age_days_adj, df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  interaction_plots[[i]] <- interact_plot(lm, pred = gestational_age, modx = age_days_adj) + ylab(y_label) + ggtitle(paste0("gabyage beta = ", as.character(signif(summary$coefficients[4,1], 3))))
}
interaction_plots
}
}
```

## BW

### Volume

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg) & is.na(df.zscore$aparc_GrayVol_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw_vol$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw_vol$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw_vol %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(bw_vol), perl = TRUE)

bw_vol$label <- rownames(bw_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

bw_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", bw_vol$label[cols_edit])

bw_vol_sig_MC <- bw_vol %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw_vol_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bw_vol
name <- "bw_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bw_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(bw_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bw_vol_noplot <- bw_vol_sig_MC[!(bw_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bw_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bw_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BW Volume"))

(bw_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "BW Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw_dkt_vol_plot, "bw-dkt-vol", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
panel_save(bw_aseg_vol_plot , "bw-aseg-vol", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
}
```

##### Scatterplot for top betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(bw_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
top_n = if(dim(bw_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 10) {10} else {dim(bw_vol_sig_MC)[1]}
top <- bw_vol_sig_MC[order(bw_vol_sig_MC$bw_beta, decreasing = TRUE)[1:top_n],]
scatterplots_bw_vol <- vector(mode = "list", length = top_n)
for(i in 1:top_n){
  pheno <- rownames(top)[i]
  title <- top$label[i]
  names(scatterplots_bw_vol[i]) <- pheno
  scatterplots_bw_vol[[i]] <- ggplot(df.zscore, aes(x = birth_weight_kg, y = !!sym(pheno))) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(x = "Gestational Age (z-scored)", y = "Centile (z-scored)", title = title)
}

nCol <- 2
nRow <- 2
breaks <- c(seq(from = 0, to = top_n , by = (nCol*nRow)), top_n) %>% unique(.)
for(k in 1:(length(breaks)-1)){
  start <- breaks[k]+1
  end <- breaks[k+1]
  do.call("grid.arrange", c(scatterplots_bw_vol[start:end], ncol=nCol))
}
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bwbyage_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg*age_days_adj, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   bwbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[4,1], bwbyage_p = summary$coefficients[4,4], bwbyage_se = summary$coefficients[4,2])
})))

bwbyage_vol$bwbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage_vol$bwbyage_p, method = "BH")
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(bwbyage_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
vars <- rownames(bwbyage_vol_sig_MC[order(-(bwbyage_vol_sig_MC$bwbyage_beta)),])
interaction_plots <-  vector(mode = "list", length = length(vars))
if (length(vars) > 0) {
for (i in 1:length(vars)){
  x <- df.zscore[,grepl(pattern = paste0(vars[i],"$"), names(df.zscore))]
  y_label <- sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", vars[i])
  y_label <- sub("aseg_", "", vars[i])
  y_label <- sub("X", "", vars[i])
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg*age_days_adj, df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  interaction_plots[[i]] <- interact_plot(lm, pred = birth_weight_kg, modx = age_days_adj) + ylab(y_label) + ggtitle(paste0("bwbyage beta = ", as.character(signif(summary$coefficients[4,1], 3))))
}
interaction_plots
}
}
```

### Surface Area

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg) & is.na(df.zscore$aparc_SurfArea_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw_sa$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw_sa$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw_sa %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw_sa$label <- rownames(bw_sa) %>% 
  sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", .)

bw_sa_sig_MC <- bw_sa %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw_sa_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bw_sa
name <- "bw_surfArea.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bw_sa_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bw_sa_noplot <- bw_sa_sig_MC[!(bw_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bw_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bw_dkt_sa_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BW Surface Area"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw_dkt_sa_plot, "bw-dkt-sa", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
}
```

##### Scatterplot for top betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(bw_sa_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
top_n = if(dim(bw_sa_sig_MC)[1] > 10) {10} else {dim(bw_sa_sig_MC)[1]}
top <- bw_sa_sig_MC[order(bw_sa_sig_MC$bw_beta, decreasing = TRUE)[1:top_n],]
scatterplots_bw_sa <- vector(mode = "list", length = top_n)
for(i in 1:top_n){
  pheno <- rownames(top)[i]
  title <- top$label[i]
  names(scatterplots_bw_sa[i]) <- pheno
  scatterplots_bw_sa[[i]] <- ggplot(df.zscore, aes(x = birth_weight_kg, y = !!sym(pheno))) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(x = "Gestational Age (z-scored)", y = "Centile (z-scored)", title = title)
}

nCol <- 2
nRow <- 2
breaks <- c(seq(from = 0, to = top_n , by = (nCol*nRow)), top_n) %>% unique(.)
for(k in 1:(length(breaks)-1)){
  start <- breaks[k]+1
  end <- breaks[k+1]
  do.call("grid.arrange", c(scatterplots_bw_sa[start:end], ncol=nCol))
}
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bwbyage_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg*age_days_adj, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   bwbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[4,1], bwbyage_p = summary$coefficients[4,4], bwbyage_se = summary$coefficients[4,2])
})))

bwbyage_sa$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage_sa$bw_p, method = "BH")
bwbyage_sa$bwbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage_sa$bwbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(bwbyage_sa %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(bwbyage_sa %>% filter(bwbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwbyage_sa %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bwbyage_sa$label <- rownames(bwbyage_sa) %>% 
  sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", .)

bwbyage_sa_sig_MC <- bwbyage_sa %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bwbyage_sa_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}

  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```
