```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw.qc.global_vol$label <- rownames(bw.qc.global_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

bw.qc.global_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", bw.qc.global_vol$label[cols_edit])

bw.qc.global_vol_sig_MC <- bw.qc.global_vol %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bw.qc.global_vol
name <- "bw.qc.global_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bw.qc.global_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(bw.qc.global_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bw.qc.global_vol_noplot <- bw.qc.global_vol_sig_MC[!(bw.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bw.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bw.qc.global_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BW, QC and global covar, Volume"))

(bw.qc.global_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "BW, QC and global covar, Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw.qc.global_dkt_vol_plot, "bw-qc-global-dkt-vol", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
panel_save(bw.qc.global_aseg_vol_plot , "bw-qc-global-aseg-vol", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bwbyage.qc.global_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg", "age_days_adj", "qc_var", global_measure_vol, "birth_weight_kg:age_days_adj"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   bwbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[6,1], bwbyage_p = summary$coefficients[6,4], bwbyage_se = summary$coefficients[6,2])
})))

bwbyage.qc.global_vol$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc.global_vol$bw_p, method = "BH")
bwbyage.qc.global_vol$bwbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc.global_vol$bwbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(bwbyage.qc.global_vol %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc.global_vol %>% filter(bwbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc.global_vol %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(bwbyage.qc.global_vol), perl = TRUE)

bwbyage.qc.global_vol$label <- rownames(bwbyage.qc.global_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

bwbyage.qc.global_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", bwbyage.qc.global_vol$label[cols_edit])

bwbyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC <- bwbyage.qc.global_vol %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bwbyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$bwbyage_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bwbyage.qc.global_vol
name <- "bwbyage.qc.global_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualize interaction betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bwbyage.qc.global_vol_noplot <- bwbyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC[!(bwbyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bwbyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bwbyage.qc.global_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bwbyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BWxAge, QC and global covar, Volume"))

(bwbyage.qc.global_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = bwbyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "BWxAge, QC and global covar, Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bwbyage.qc.global_dkt_vol_plot, "bwbyage-qc-global-dkt-vol", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
panel_save(bwbyage.qc.global_aseg_vol_plot , "bwbyage-qc-global-aseg-vol", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
}
```

### Surface Area

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
print(glue("Global measure for surface area is {global_measure_sa}"))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg) & is.na(df.zscore$aparc_SurfArea_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc.global_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg", "qc_var", global_measure_sa), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc.global_sa$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc.global_sa$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc.global_sa %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw.qc.global_sa$label <- rownames(bw.qc.global_sa) %>% 
  sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", .)

bw.qc.global_sa_sig_MC <- bw.qc.global_sa %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc.global_sa_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}

  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L",

  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
```
```{r, echo = FALSE}
}
```

### Thickness

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
print(glue("Global measure for cortical thickness is {global_measure_th}"))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg) & !is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts) & df.zscore$age_over2_adj == TRUE)
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc.global_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[df.zscore$age_over2_adj == TRUE, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg", "qc_var", global_measure_th), response = "x"), data = df.zscore[df.zscore$age_over2_adj == TRUE,])
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc.global_th$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc.global_th$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc.global_th %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw.qc.global_th$label <- rownames(bw.qc.global_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

bw.qc.global_th_sig_MC <- bw.qc.global_th %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc.global_th_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}

  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
```
```{r, echo = FALSE}
}
```

## BWP with qc and a global measure covariate

### Volume

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
print(glue("Global measure for volume is {global_measure_vol}"))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$bwp_fen) & is.na(df.zscore$aparc_GrayVol_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bwp.qc.global_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("bwp_fen", "qc_var", global_measure_vol), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bwp_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bwp_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bwp_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bwp.qc.global_vol$bwp_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwp.qc.global_vol$bwp_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bwp.qc.global_vol %>% filter(bwp_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(bwp.qc.global_vol), perl = TRUE)

bwp.qc.global_vol$label <- rownames(bwp.qc.global_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

bwp.qc.global_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", bwp.qc.global_vol$label[cols_edit])

bwp.qc.global_vol_sig_MC <- bwp.qc.global_vol %>% filter(bwp_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bwp.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$bwp_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bwp.qc.global_vol
name <- "bwp.qc.global_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bwp.qc.global_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(bwp.qc.global_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bwp.qc.global_vol_noplot <- bwp.qc.global_vol_sig_MC[!(bwp.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bwp.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bwp.qc.global_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bwp_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BWP, QC and global covar, Volume"))

(bwp.qc.global_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = bwp_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "BWP, QC and global covar, Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bwp.qc.global_dkt_vol_plot, "bwp-qc-global-dkt-vol", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
panel_save(bwp.qc.global_aseg_vol_plot , "bwp-qc-global-aseg-vol", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bwpbyage.qc.global_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("bwp_fen", "age_days_adj", "qc_var", global_measure_vol, "bwp_fen:age_days_adj"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bwp_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bwp_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bwp_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   bwpbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[6,1], bwpbyage_p = summary$coefficients[6,4], bwpbyage_se = summary$coefficients[6,2])
})))

bwpbyage.qc.global_vol$bwp_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwpbyage.qc.global_vol$bwp_p, method = "BH")
bwpbyage.qc.global_vol$bwpbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwpbyage.qc.global_vol$bwpbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(bwpbyage.qc.global_vol %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(bwpbyage.qc.global_vol %>% filter(bwpbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwpbyage.qc.global_vol %>% filter(bwpbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(bwpbyage.qc.global_vol), perl = TRUE)

bwpbyage.qc.global_vol$label <- rownames(bwpbyage.qc.global_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

bwpbyage.qc.global_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", bwpbyage.qc.global_vol$label[cols_edit])

bwpbyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC <- bwpbyage.qc.global_vol %>% filter(bwpbyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bwpbyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$bwpbyage_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bwpbyage.qc.global_vol
name <- "bwpbyage.qc.global_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

### Surface Area

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
print(glue("Global measure for surface area is {global_measure_sa}"))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$bwp_fen) & is.na(df.zscore$aparc_SurfArea_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bwp.qc.global_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("bwp_fen", "qc_var", global_measure_sa), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bwp_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bwp_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bwp_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bwp.qc.global_sa$bwp_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwp.qc.global_sa$bwp_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bwp.qc.global_sa %>% filter(bwp_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", .)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bwp.qc.global_sa_sig_MC$bwp_beta)))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
```

### Thickness

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
print(glue("Global measure for cortical thickness is {global_measure_th}"))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$bwp_fen) & !is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts) & df.zscore$age_over2_adj == TRUE)
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bwp.qc.global_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[df.zscore$age_over2_adj == TRUE, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("bwp_fen", "qc_var", global_measure_th), response = "x"), data = df.zscore[df.zscore$age_over2_adj == TRUE,])
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bwp_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bwp_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bwp_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bwp.qc.global_th$bwp_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwp.qc.global_th$bwp_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bwp.qc.global_th %>% filter(bwp_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}

  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bwp.qc.global_th_sig_MC$bwp_beta)))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L",

  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas

output_folder <- betas_folder

}
```

# Regional phenotypes (euler score QC and weight/height at encounter covariate, thickness >= 1 year at scan)
Using weight/height sds (in units of standard deviation) calculated using the childsds package, using WHO growth charts, with sex and adjusted age in years as input.
## GA with qc and weight/height (at time of scan) covariate

### Volume

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
N <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age) & !is.na(df.zscore$aparc_GrayVol_lh_bankssts) & !is.na(df.zscore$weight_at_enc_cent) & !is.na(df.zscore$height_at_enc_cent))
print(glue("Total N with Vol, GA and weight/height at enc {N}"))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga.qc.wh_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("gestational_age", "qc_var", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga.qc.wh_vol$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc.wh_vol$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(ga.qc.wh_vol), perl = TRUE)

ga.qc.wh_vol$label <- rownames(ga.qc.wh_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

ga.qc.wh_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", ga.qc.wh_vol$label[cols_edit])

ga.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC <- ga.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(ga.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- ga.qc.wh_vol
name <- "ga.qc.wh_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(ga.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(ga.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(ga.qc.wh_vol_noplot <- ga.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC[!(ga.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(ga.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(ga.qc.wh_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GA, QC and W/H covar, Volume"))

(ga.qc.wh_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "GA, QC and W/H covar, Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(ga.qc.wh_dkt_vol_plot, "ga-qc-wh-dkt-vol", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
panel_save(ga.qc.wh_aseg_vol_plot , "ga-qc-wh-aseg-vol", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
gabyage.qc.wh_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("gestational_age", "age_days_adj", "qc_var", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent", "gestational_age:age_days_adj"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   gabyage_beta = summary$coefficients[7,1], gabyage_p = summary$coefficients[7,4], gabyage_se = summary$coefficients[7,2])
})))

gabyage.qc.wh_vol$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc.wh_vol$ga_p, method = "BH")
gabyage.qc.wh_vol$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc.wh_vol$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(gabyage.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(gabyage.qc.wh_vol), perl = TRUE)

gabyage.qc.wh_vol$label <- rownames(gabyage.qc.wh_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

gabyage.qc.wh_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", gabyage.qc.wh_vol$label[cols_edit])

gabyage.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC <- gabyage.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(gabyage.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$gabyage_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- gabyage.qc.wh_vol
name <- "gabyage.qc.wh_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
# plots

  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = gabyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GAxAge, QC and W/H covar, Volume"))

(gabyage.qc.wh_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = gabyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "GAxAge, QC and W/H covar, Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){

panel_save(gabyage.qc.wh_aseg_vol_plot , "gabyage-qc-wh-aseg-vol", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
}
```

### Surface Area

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
N <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age) & !is.na(df.zscore$aparc_SurfArea_lh_bankssts) & !is.na(df.zscore$weight_at_enc_cent) & !is.na(df.zscore$height_at_enc_cent))
print(glue("Total N with SA, GA and weight/height at enc {N}"))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga.qc.wh_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("gestational_age", "qc_var", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga.qc.wh_sa$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc.wh_sa$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga.qc.wh_sa %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
ga.qc.wh_sa$label <- rownames(ga.qc.wh_sa) %>% 
  sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", .)

ga.qc.wh_sa_sig_MC <- ga.qc.wh_sa %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(ga.qc.wh_sa_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}

  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
```
```{r, echo = FALSE}
}
```

### Thickness

####  simple linear regressions

```{r, echo = FALSE}
N <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$gestational_age) & !is.na(df.zscore_overOne$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts) & !is.na(df.zscore_overOne$weight_at_enc_cent) & !is.na(df.zscore_overOne$height_at_enc_cent))

# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga.qc.wh_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("gestational_age", "qc_var", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore_overOne)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga.qc.wh_th$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc.wh_th$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga.qc.wh_th %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

## BW with qc and weight/height (at time of scan)  covariate

### Volume

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
N <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg) & !is.na(df.zscore$aparc_GrayVol_lh_bankssts) & !is.na(df.zscore$weight_at_enc_cent) & !is.na(df.zscore$height_at_enc_cent))
print(glue("Total N with Vol, BW and weight/height at enc {N}"))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc.wh_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg", "qc_var", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc.wh_vol$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc.wh_vol$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(bw.qc.wh_vol), perl = TRUE)

bw.qc.wh_vol$label <- rownames(bw.qc.wh_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

bw.qc.wh_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", bw.qc.wh_vol$label[cols_edit])

bw.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC <- bw.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bw.qc.wh_vol
name <- "bw.qc.wh_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bw.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(bw.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bw.qc.wh_vol_noplot <- bw.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC[!(bw.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bw.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bw.qc.wh_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BW, QC and W/H covar, Volume"))

(bw.qc.wh_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "BW, QC and W/H covar, Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw.qc.wh_dkt_vol_plot, "bw-qc-wh-dkt-vol", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
panel_save(bw.qc.wh_aseg_vol_plot , "bw-qc-wh-aseg-vol", "svg", ggseg_plot_folder)
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bwbyage.qc.wh_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg", "age_days_adj", "qc_var", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent", "birth_weight_kg:age_days_adj"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   bwbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[7,1], bwbyage_p = summary$coefficients[7,4], bwbyage_se = summary$coefficients[7,2])
})))

bwbyage.qc.wh_vol$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc.wh_vol$bw_p, method = "BH")
bwbyage.qc.wh_vol$bwbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc.wh_vol$bwbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(bwbyage.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(bwbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(bwbyage.qc.wh_vol), perl = TRUE)

bwbyage.qc.wh_vol$label <- rownames(bwbyage.qc.wh_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

bwbyage.qc.wh_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", bwbyage.qc.wh_vol$label[cols_edit])

bwbyage.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC <- bwbyage.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bwbyage.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$bwbyage_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bwbyage.qc.wh_vol
name <- "bwbyage.qc.wh_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regions not matched in atlases
(bwbyage.qc.wh_vol_noplot <- bwbyage.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC[!(bwbyage.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bwbyage.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots

  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BWxAge, QC and W/H covar, Volume"))

  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = bwbyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "BWxAge, QC and W/H covar, Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
```

### Surface Area

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
N <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg) & !is.na(df.zscore$aparc_SurfArea_lh_bankssts) & !is.na(df.zscore$weight_at_enc_cent) & !is.na(df.zscore$height_at_enc_cent))
print(glue("Total N with SA, BW and weight/height at enc {N}"))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc.wh_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg", "qc_var", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc.wh_sa$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc.wh_sa$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc.wh_sa %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw.qc.wh_sa$label <- rownames(bw.qc.wh_sa) %>% 
  sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", .)

bw.qc.wh_sa_sig_MC <- bw.qc.wh_sa %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc.wh_sa_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L",

  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
```
```{r, echo = FALSE}
}
```

### Thickness

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
N <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$birth_weight_kg) & !is.na(df.zscore_overOne$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts) & !is.na(df.zscore_overOne$weight_at_enc_cent) & !is.na(df.zscore_overOne$height_at_enc_cent))

# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc.wh_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg", "qc_var", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore_overOne)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc.wh_th$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc.wh_th$bw_p, method = "BH")
```

# Save scale images

## beta scale
```{r, echo = FALSE}
#  Create dummy data just to generate the colorbar
df <- data.frame(x = 1, y = 1, beta = 0)

beta_scale_hor <- ggplot(df, aes(x, y, fill = beta)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = low_color,
    mid = mid_color,
    high = high_color,
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = limits,
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      barwidth = 20,   #  length of colorbar
      barheight = 1    #  thickness
    )
  ) +
  theme_void() +  #  remove axes, grid, etc.
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14)
  )

beta_scale_vert <- ggplot(df, aes(x, y, fill = beta)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = low_color,
    mid = mid_color,
    high = high_color,
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = limits,
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      barwidth = 1,   #  length of colorbar
      barheight = 20    #  thickness
    )
  ) +
  theme_void() +  #  remove axes, grid, etc.
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14)
  )
beta_scale_hor
beta_scale_vert
if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(beta_scale_hor, "beta-scale-hor", "svg", plot_output_folder)
  panel_save(beta_scale_vert, "beta-scale-vert", "svg", plot_output_folder)
}
```

# Sliding Window Analyses

## Global phenotypes sliding window
```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="200%", out.height="200%"}
global_vars_totest <- c("global_eTIV", "global_SubCortGrayVol","global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol","global_SurfaceArea",
                        "global_MeanThickness")
global_sw_ga_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(global_vars_totest)), global_vars_totest)
global_sw_bw_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(global_vars_totest)), global_vars_totest)
global_sw_bwp_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(global_vars_totest)), global_vars_totest)

global_sw_ga <- setNames(lapply(global_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df = df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "gestational_age", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), global_vars_totest)
global_sw_bw <- setNames(lapply(global_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "birth_weight_kg", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), global_vars_totest)

global_sw_bwp <- setNames(lapply(global_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "bwp_fen", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), global_vars_totest)

## pre-set y - axis limits and convert x-axis to actual age (instead of z-scoring)
mean_age_days = mean(cent_all$age_days_adj)
sd_age_days = sd(cent_all$age_days_adj)
x_breaks <- c((280-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days, 
              ((365.25*3+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days, 
              ((365.25*6+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*9+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*12+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*15+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*18+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*21+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days)
x_labs <- c("0y","3y","6y","9y","12y","15y","18y","21y")

for (i in 1:length(global_vars_totest)){
  pheno = global_vars_totest[i]
  
  global_sw_ga_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(global_sw_ga[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig))+ 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = " GA Beta (slope)", title = sub("global_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
  
  global_sw_bw_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(global_sw_bw[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig)) + 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "BW Beta (slope)", title = sub("global_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
  
  global_sw_bwp_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(global_sw_bwp[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig)) + 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "BWp Beta (slope)", title = sub("global_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
}

global_sw_ga_grid <- wrap_plots(global_sw_ga_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

global_sw_bw_grid <- wrap_plots(global_sw_bw_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

global_sw_bwp_grid <- wrap_plots(global_sw_bwp_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(global_sw_ga_grid, "sliding-global-ga-grid", "svg", slwindow_plot_folder, plot_width = 10, plot_height = 12)
panel_save(global_sw_bw_grid, "sliding-global-bw-grid", "svg", slwindow_plot_folder, plot_width = 10, plot_height = 12)
panel_save(global_sw_bwp_grid, "sliding-global-bwp-grid", "svg", slwindow_plot_folder, plot_width = 10, plot_height = 12)
}

if(save_tables == TRUE){
  saveRDS(global_sw_ga, file = glue("{slwindow_folder}sliding-global-ga.rds"))
  saveRDS(global_sw_bw, file = glue("{slwindow_folder}sliding-global-bw.rds"))
  saveRDS(global_sw_bwp, file = glue("{slwindow_folder}sliding-global-bwp.rds"))
}

global_sw_ga_grid
global_sw_bw_grid
global_sw_bwp_grid
```

## Volumes sliding window
```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="400%", out.height="400%"}
ga_vol_vars_totest <- rownames(ga.qc_vol_sig_MC)
bw_vol_vars_totest <- rownames(bw.qc_vol_sig_MC)

vol_sw_ga_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(ga_vol_vars_totest)), ga_vol_vars_totest)
vol_sw_bw_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(bw_vol_vars_totest)), bw_vol_vars_totest)
vol_sw_bwp_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(bw_vol_vars_totest)), bw_vol_vars_totest)

vol_sw_ga <- setNames(lapply(ga_vol_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df = df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "gestational_age", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), ga_vol_vars_totest)
vol_sw_bw <- setNames(lapply(bw_vol_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "birth_weight_kg", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), bw_vol_vars_totest)

vol_sw_bwp <- setNames(lapply(bw_vol_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "bwp_fen", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), bw_vol_vars_totest)

## pre-set y - axis limits and convert x-axis to actual age (instead of z-scoring)
mean_age_days = mean(cent_all$age_days_adj)
sd_age_days = sd(cent_all$age_days_adj)
x_breaks <- c((280-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days, 
              ((365.25*3+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days, 
              ((365.25*6+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*9+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*12+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*15+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*18+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*21+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days)
x_labs <- c("0y","3y","6y","9y","12y","15y","18y","21y")

for (i in 1:length(ga_vol_vars_totest)){
  pheno = ga_vol_vars_totest[i]
  
  vol_sw_ga_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(vol_sw_ga[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig))+ 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = " GA Beta (slope)", title = sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
}

for (i in 1:length(bw_vol_vars_totest)){
  pheno = bw_vol_vars_totest[i]
  
  vol_sw_bw_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(vol_sw_bw[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig)) + 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "BW Beta (slope)", title = sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
  
  vol_sw_bwp_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(vol_sw_bwp[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig)) + 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "BWp Beta (slope)", title = sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
}

vol_sw_ga_grid <- wrap_plots(vol_sw_ga_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

vol_sw_bw_grid <- wrap_plots(vol_sw_bw_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

vol_sw_bwp_grid <- wrap_plots(vol_sw_bwp_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

if(save_figs == TRUE){

panel_save(vol_sw_bw_grid, "sliding-vol-bw-grid", "svg", slwindow_plot_folder, plot_width = 22, plot_height = 16)
panel_save(vol_sw_bwp_grid, "sliding-vol-bwp-grid", "svg", slwindow_plot_folder, plot_width = 22, plot_height = 16)
}

  saveRDS(vol_sw_bw, file = glue("{slwindow_folder}sliding-vol-bw.rds"))

}
```

## Surface Area sliding window
```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="400%", out.height="400%"}
ga_sa_vars_totest <- rownames(ga.qc_sa_sig_MC)
bw_sa_vars_totest <- rownames(bw.qc_sa_sig_MC)

sa_sw_ga_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(ga_sa_vars_totest)), ga_sa_vars_totest)
sa_sw_bw_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(bw_sa_vars_totest)), bw_sa_vars_totest)
sa_sw_bwp_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(bw_sa_vars_totest)), bw_sa_vars_totest)

sa_sw_ga <- setNames(lapply(ga_sa_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df = df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "gestational_age", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), ga_sa_vars_totest)
sa_sw_bw <- setNames(lapply(bw_sa_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "birth_weight_kg",

}), bw_sa_vars_totest)

  sliding_window_eqsize(df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "bwp_fen", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), bw_sa_vars_totest)

## pre-set y - axis limits and convert x-axis to actual age (instead of z-scoring)
mean_age_days = mean(cent_all$age_days_adj)
sd_age_days = sd(cent_all$age_days_adj)
x_breaks <- c((280-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days, 
              ((365.25*3+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days, 
              ((365.25*6+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,

              ((365.25*18+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*21+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days)
x_labs <- c("0y","3y","6y","9y","12y","15y","18y","21y")

for (i in 1:length(ga_sa_vars_totest)){
  pheno = ga_sa_vars_totest[i]
  
  sa_sw_ga_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(sa_sw_ga[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig))+ 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = " GA Beta (slope)", title = sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
}

for (i in 1:length(bw_sa_vars_totest)){
  pheno = bw_sa_vars_totest[i]
  
  sa_sw_bw_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(sa_sw_bw[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig)) + 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "BW Beta (slope)", title = sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
  
  sa_sw_bwp_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(sa_sw_bwp[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig)) + 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +

  theme_minimal()
}

  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
```

```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="400%", out.height="400%"}
ga_th_vars_totest <- rownames(ga.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC)
bw_th_vars_totest <- rownames(bw.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC)

th_sw_ga_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(ga_th_vars_totest)), ga_th_vars_totest)
th_sw_bw_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(bw_th_vars_totest)), bw_th_vars_totest)
th_sw_bwp_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(bw_th_vars_totest)), bw_th_vars_totest)

th_sw_ga <- setNames(lapply(ga_th_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df = df.zscore_overOne, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "gestational_age", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), ga_th_vars_totest)
th_sw_bw <- setNames(lapply(bw_th_vars_totest, function(pheno){

                             phenotype = pheno,

              ((365.25*21+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days)

for (i in 1:length(ga_th_vars_totest)){
  pheno = ga_th_vars_totest[i]

  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = " GA Beta (slope)", title = sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
}

for (i in 1:length(bw_th_vars_totest)){
  pheno = bw_th_vars_totest[i]

  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "BWp Beta (slope)", title = sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +

}

th_sw_ga_grid <- wrap_plots(th_sw_ga_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

th_sw_bw_grid <- wrap_plots(th_sw_bw_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

th_sw_bwp_grid <- wrap_plots(th_sw_bwp_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(th_sw_ga_grid, "sliding-th-ga-grid", "svg", slwindow_plot_folder, plot_width = 22, plot_height = 16)
panel_save(th_sw_bw_grid, "sliding-th-bw-grid", "svg", slwindow_plot_folder, plot_width = 22, plot_height = 16)
panel_save(th_sw_bwp_grid, "sliding-th-bwp-grid", "svg", slwindow_plot_folder, plot_width = 22, plot_height = 16)
}

if(save_tables == TRUE){
  saveRDS(th_sw_ga, file = glue("{slwindow_folder}sliding-th-ga.rds"))
  saveRDS(th_sw_bw, file = glue("{slwindow_folder}sliding-th-bw.rds"))
  saveRDS(th_sw_bwp, file = glue("{slwindow_folder}sliding-th-bwp.rds"))
}

th_sw_ga_grid
th_sw_bw_grid
th_sw_bwp_grid
```
